summary: Executed backend pytest and frontend Playwright on public preview URL for recurring events, announcements, and internal chat. Backend APIs passed; frontend flows mostly worked with one reproducible recurrence visibility regression.

integration_issues.flow: Gatherings recurring event creation -> immediate list display
integration_issues.issue: After creating a weekly recurring event, only the parent event appears immediately (1 card). Generated recurring instances (5 children) appear only after full page reload.

action_items: Fix GatheringsPage post-create state sync so recurring child instances render immediately without manual reload (likely reload events list after create or API return should include created instances).
Retest recurring creation UI after fix using the same reproduction path.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend integration gap in /app/frontend/src/components/GatheringsPage.jsx: handleCreateEvent appends only POST response payload (parent event) and does not refresh list, causing stale UI for backend-generated recurring children.
backend/server.py is very large (>700 lines) and should be split into domain routers/services for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST/UI communities and data via real APIs/UI: recurring events, subyard-scoped announcement with attachment+comment, chat message with attachment + pin/unpin + comment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://community-cipher.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest: 14/14 passed including new recurrence/announcements/chat backend coverage. Playwright confirmed auth, courtyards, announcements, chat, gatherings, and home navigation. Repro for UI issue: create weekly event -> count matching cards before reload=1, after reload=6.
rca of the issue: RCA: Backend correctly creates 1 parent + 5 recurring child events (validated by pytest and UI count after reload). Frontend handleCreateEvent updates local events state with only the parent API response and does not refetch /api/events after creation. Reproduction: login -> Gatherings -> create weekly recurring event -> immediate list shows only parent -> reload page -> all 6 events appear. Mitigation: after successful create, call loadData() or append server-returned instances if API contract changes.
